description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build pwsafe with CMake on macOS that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a single macos-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up environment variables, forces a compatible Xcode version, installs dependencies, builds libyubikey and ykpers from upstream, caches and builds wxWidgets, generates and prints xcconfigs, generates an Xcode project with CMake, builds pwsafe, installs language files, creates a dmg, and uploads the artifact.
